title: Neon Meteor Run 1.2.0
summary: Canvas gameplay landed with pulse attacks, shield pickups, combo scoring, and persistent best-run tracking.

title: Arcade feed runtime sync
summary: The hub now refreshes the cabinet manifest and update rail from runtime JSON without waiting for a full app rebuild.

title: Hextris cabinet fallback
summary: Embedded cabinets now surface better open-tab recovery and route-side status details.
